title: selaginella densa var. densa
intro: Selaginella densa var. densa, also known as Jungle Spikemoss or Selaginella, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Selaginella densa var. densa include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory conditions, and boosting the immune system. Selaginella densa var. densa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
